headlines.title: High-Speed Pursuit on I-5 Reaches 130 mph
headlines.summary: Two people are in custody after a high-speed pursuit on I-5 from Federal Way to Lakewood that reached speeds of up to 130 mph, according to Washington State Patrol.

headlines.title: The Picklr Opens New Seattle Location in Fremont
headlines.summary: The Picklr will open its brand-new Seattle location in Fremont this weekend, with a grand opening celebration on Saturday, April 4.

headlines.title: Belltown Shooting Under Investigation
headlines.summary: Seattle police are investigating a Friday night shooting on 3rd Avenue in Belltown.

headlines.title: Mariners Win in Extra Innings
headlines.summary: Cole Young broke a scoreless tie with an RBI triple leading off the 10th inning, and Bryan Woo combined with the Seattle Mariners' bullpen to pitch 10 innings of scoreless baseball.

headlines.title: Young Gray Whale Found Dead in Willapa River
headlines.summary: A young gray whale spotted in Willapa River has been pronounced dead, according to KIRO 7 News.

headlines.title: SPS Superintendent on Community Engagement Tour
headlines.summary: Seattle Public Schools' new superintendent is on the second-to-last stop of a community-engagement tour, visiting West Seattle among other neighborhoods.

top_story.title: High-Speed Pursuit on I-5 Reaches 130 mph
top_story.summary: Two suspects are in custody following a dramatic high-speed pursuit on Interstate 5 from Federal Way to Lakewood. Washington State Patrol reports the chase reached speeds of up to 130 mph before the suspects were apprehended.
top_story.why_it_matters: High-speed pursuits on major highways pose significant risks to public safety. This incident highlights ongoing law enforcement challenges in the Puget Sound region.
